description: Test whether adding directive language at the end of tool descriptions improves adoption

companion_descriptions.write_file: Writes a file to the local filesystem. Supports diff preview before commit.
companion_descriptions.edit_text: Performs exact string replacements in files. Supports undo via preview before applying.
companion_descriptions.find_text:
- Fast content search tool that works with any codebase size
- Searches file contents using regular expressions. Supports structured results with line numbers.
companion_descriptions.diff: Show or apply unified diffs of pending edits.

variants.description: Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Use first.
Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Preferred for file reads.
Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Recommended over alternatives.
Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. First use this tool for all file reads.
Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Use this tool first for all file reads.
